title: MARA Holdings Reports Record-Breaking Q4 and Full Year 2024 Results
text: MARA Holdings (NASDAQ: MARA) announced exceptional financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year 2024, achieving record-high Revenue, Net Income, and Adjusted EBITDA across both periods. The company demonstrated strong operational efficiency with a direct energy cost of $28.8K per bitcoin from company-owned mining sites throughout 2024. Shareholders benefited from a bitcoin yield of 62.9% per share for the full year. The firm operates as a global leader in digital asset compute that develops and deploys innovative technologies to advance sustainable energy solutions. The company's strategy focuses on converting underutilized renewable energy into economic value through blockchain operations. MARA held an earnings webcast on February 26, 2025, at 5:00 p.m. ET to discuss detailed financial results. The complete shareholder letter and supporting documentation were made available through the company's investor relations website and filed with the Securities and Exchange Commission. The results reflect MARA's positioning within the cryptocurrency mining sector and its emphasis on energy efficiency and sustainability practices.
